'''Baraboo biomold''' was a microscopic [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] organism native to [[Baraboo]]. Flecks of Baraboo biomold were among the millions of aquatic creatures living in the [[Royal Icqui Aquaria]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
